mapper.select: SELECT operation_type, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY operation_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT level, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY level ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT HOUR(created_at) as hour, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY HOUR(created_at) ORDER BY hour ASC
SELECT operator_name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM logs WHERE created_at BETWEEN CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY operator_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT #{limit}
